lines.text: POV: You realized 2011 was 15 years ago and you still haven't moved on from Dhoni's six. 🏆
Jethalal to Babita Ji: 'Good Morning.' Jethalal to Iyer Bhai: 'Aye pagal aurat!' 💀
Editing 4K on a 4GB RAM phone is the ultimate test of patience. 🫠
POV: You are watching peak MS Dhoni finishing the game with a six. 🚁🔥
Bro thinks he's a professional editor but uses 'Fade In' on every clip. 🤡
Life is hard, but seeing RCB fans' loyalty is harder. Respect. ✊
Daya Ben's 'Hey Maa Mataji' is a mood when the project file gets corrupted. 😭
Thala for a reason. 7 is not just a number, it's an emotion. 💛
POV: When the beat drops and your transition actually aligns perfectly. ✨
Savage Level: Jethalal giving logic to Bapuji. 👴🚫
Rohit Sharma's pull shot is more satisfying than a 60FPS export. 🏏
Stop asking for XML. Build your own graphs and be a King. 👑
When someone says 'Editing toh aasan hai.' - Me: 'Chup kar, saatve fail!' 😡
POV: You're waiting for Babita Ji's entry in every TMKOC episode. 😍
Virat Kohli's aggression is the energy we need in our editing sessions. ⚡
Bro spent 5 hours on a 15-second edit and got 10 likes. We feel you. 🫂
Sundar Lal coming to Mumbai is the real horror movie. 😱
CSK vs MI in finals is not a match, it's a war. ⚔️
POV: Your mom enters the room while you're editing a 'Savage' roast. 💀
Alight Motion users seeing CapCut users getting 'Auto-Transitions' 👁️👄👁️
Bagha's 'Jaisi jiski soch' is the only way to deal with haters. 💼
Thala behind the stumps > Any Google Search. Speed matters. 🧤
POV: You're a backbencher but your editing skills are front-row. 🎓
Exporting 4K 60FPS... 97%... 98%... 99%... CRASHED. 💔
Iyer Bhai's reaction when Jethalal calls him 'Iyer Idli'. 🍛
Gambhir vs Kohli is the 'El Clasico' we didn't know we needed. 🔥
POV: You are the only one in the group who knows how to remove Green Screen. 🐍
Watching old Pepsi ads because current ones don't have that OG vibe. 🥤
Tappu Sena grew up, but we're still stuck in the 2012 TMKOC episodes. 📺
Bro's transitions are smoother than my career path. 📉
When you use 100+ layers and the preview starts lagging at 2FPS. 🐢
POV: You are MS Dhoni and it's the last ball. The stadium is silent. 🤫
Popatlal's 'Duniya hila dunga' is why he's still single. 🌂
If 'Savage' had a face, it would be Rohit Sharma in a post-match interview. 🎤
Editing is 10% skills and 90% finding the right song. 🎵
POV: Your friend says 'Edit karke dede, bhai nahi hai?' 🤡
Jethalal's diet is 50% Jalebi Fafda and 50% Iyer's frustration. 🥨
Seeing the 'Low Storage' notification right before the final export. 🧨
Winning the IPL is hard, but finding a loyal friend is harder. 🏆
POV: You are watching the OG 'Thanda Matlab Coca-Cola' ads. 🧊
Ghanshyam Bhai's 'Aaiye Mehtaji' is the hospitality we all need. 🤝
SkyVerse isn't just a channel, it's an editing empire. 🌌
POV: You finally hit 2k subs and now the 10k road looks clear. 🚀
When you try to copy a tutorial but the 'Graph' looks like a mountain range. 📈
Bapuji to Jethalal: 'Besist Manas!' is the ultimate roast. 👴🔥
Cricket is a gentleman's game, but the fans are savages. 🏟️
POV: You are watching Virat's 82* vs Pakistan for the 100th time. 🐐
The feeling when you find the perfect SFX for a punchline. 🔊
Absence of MSD in the field is like a PC without a GPU. 💻
POV: You're trying to explain to your dad that Editing is a real job. 💼
